_meta.description: Feature and task backlog for the DS project. Owner: LEAD. Updated each session.

features.title: Data ingestion & validation
features.description: Load raw CSV, validate schema, enforce types, raise on missing target.
acceptance_criteria: Raises ValueError if target column is missing

features.title: Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA)
features.description: Distributions, missing value audit, target balance check.

features.title: Feature engineering pipeline
features.description: Imputation, encoding, scaling, interaction terms as needed.
acceptance_criteria: All transformers fit on train fold only

features.title: Feature selection — filter stage
features.description: Near-zero variance removal, pairwise Spearman filter (threshold=0.85), VIF check.
acceptance_criteria: Correlated pairs logged and one dropped

features.title: Baseline model
features.description: Train a simple baseline (LogisticRegression or DummyClassifier) to set the performance floor.
acceptance_criteria: CV score (AUC or RMSE) reported on validation set

features.title: Model experiments — RF / XGBoost
features.description: Train Random Forest and XGBoost with basic hyperparameter search.

features.title: Final evaluation on test set
features.description: One-shot evaluation of the selected model on the held-out test set.
acceptance_criteria: Test set untouched until this step
features.notes: REVIEWER must approve before this task runs.
